conversation.text: Please explain your database encryption architecture in detail, including key management and at-rest encryption standards.
Security features confirmed: encryption auth, 2FA, DDoS protection, audit logs. Detailed DB encryption architecture not in documentation. Offering to connect with security specialist.
Are you SOC2 compliant? What about GDPR?
GDPR confirmed per M800 documentation. Multiple international compliance certifications noted. SOC2 not explicitly mentioned — cannot confirm. Offering to connect.
What encryption is used for data in transit?
TLS v1.2+ required for browser connections, HTTPS/SSL for call services. Full cipher suite specs not in documentation.
